PPA因子.subject: alpha本地校验，self+ppac自相关校验及数据完整度校验
PPA因子.author: XB37939
PPA因子.content:
A post was added to the topic 顾问专属中文论坛.
(https://support.worldquantbrain.com/hc/en-us/community/topics/18910956638743-%E9%A1%BE%E9%97%AE%E4%B8%93%E5%B1%9E%E4%B8%AD%E6%96%87%E8%AE%BA%E5%9D%9B)

- alpha本地校验，self+ppac自相关校验及数据完整度校验 by XB37939
本地校验的必要性
作为一个新手顾问，回测后如何快速的找到可用的alpha至关重要。由于第一次选择的数据集是model165，里面很多数据都只有近几年有数据。生产的alpha不是一个很好的alpha，所以想过滤掉数据不全的alpha。
首先参考了LX57490的分享
https://support.worldquantbrain.com/hc/zh-cn/community/posts/35581087524503--%E6%9C%AC%E5%9C%B0self-ppac%E8%87%AA%E7%9B%B8%E5%85%B3-%E5%A4%8D%E5%88%B6%E5%8D%B3%E7%94%A8 
得到了一个可以本地校验alpha的代码。
然后对代码进行了进一步的优化，添加了数据完整度校验，丰富了下载的字段，将各种指标下载下来，方便判断和分析是否是一个好的alpha。
 

优化的功能点
登录
登录从输入账号密码改为了读取brain.txt文件，避免分享代码的时候密码泄露
# 加载凭据文件with open(expanduser('brain.txt')) as f:    credentials = json.load(f)# 从列表中提取用户名和密码username, password = credentials
barin.txt 内容
["账号","密码"]
丰富了下载的字段和校验

# 构造记录字典                    rec = {                        "alpha_id": alpha_id,                        "check_status": check_status,                        "sharpe": sharpe,                        "turnoverStr": f"{turnover:.2%}" if turnover is not None else None,                        "turnover": turnover,                        "turnoverCheck": turnover<=0.12,                        "fitness": fitness,                        "marginStr": f"{margin * 10000:.2f}‱" if margin is not None else None,  # 转换为万分比显示                        "margin": margin,                        "marginCheck": margin>=0.0005,                        "returnsStr": f"{returns:.2%}" if returns is not None else None,                        "returns": returns,                        "returnsCheck": returns>=(turnover+0.005),                        "drawdownStr": f"{drawdown:.2%}" if drawdown is not None else None,                        "drawdown": drawdown,                        "drawdownCheck": drawdown<=0.1,                        "longCount": longCount,                        "shortCount": shortCount,                        "dateCreated": dateCreated,                        "decay": decay,                        "exp": exp,                        "neutralization": neutralization,  # 添加中性化代码                        "neutralization_name": neutralization_name,  # 添加中性化可读名称                        "allCheck": turnover<=0.12 and margin>=0.0005 and returns>=(turnover+0.005) and drawdown<=0.1                    }
增加了很多指标字段，特别添加了turnoverCheck,marginCheck,returnsCheck,drawdownCheck,allCheck
可以根据自己的理解设置条件，生成校验结果，方便快速获取自己认为优质的alpha。
新增csv导出和异常处理
原始代码在做PPAC自相关性校验时有可能卡在99%不动。为了避免异常导致数据校验失败，浪费时间，所以在做自相关校验前会先生成一个csv文件。校验后生成excle。
数据完整度校验

def fetch_yearly_stats(session,alpha_id):    detail_url = f"https://api.worldquantbrain.com/alphas/{alpha_id}/recordsets/yearly-stats"    for retry in range(3):        try:            detail_resp = session.get(detail_url)            if detail_resp.status_code == 429:                time.sleep(3)                continue            if not detail_resp.text.strip() or detail_resp.text.strip().startswith('<') or 'application/json' not in detail_resp.headers.get('Content-Type', ''):                time.sleep(3)                continue            stats = detail_resp.json().get("records", [])            valid = [(y[3], y[4]) for y in stats if y[6] != 0]            # 筛选出至少有6年有数据，每年的long+short交易量大于100            if len(valid) >= 6 and all((lc + sc) > 100 for lc, sc in valid):                                return True            break        except Exception:            time.sleep(3)            continue    return False

通过判断数据是否超过六年，交易量过滤掉数据不全和不活跃的alpha
完整代码

import requestsimport pandas as pdimport loggingimport timeimport picklefrom collections import defaultdictimport numpy as npfrom tqdm import tqdmfrom pathlib import Pathfrom concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor, as_completedimport jsonimport osimport sysfrom datetime import datetimefrom typing import Optional, Tuple, Dict, List, Unionfrom requests import Responsefrom os.path import expanduserimport csv# 默认请求超时（秒） — 防止请求无限挂起导致线程池卡住DEFAULT_REQUEST_TIMEOUT = 30# ===== 参数设置 =====# 第一个算法的参数START_DATE = "11-17"  # 起始日期（MM-DD格式）END_DATE = "11-18"  # 结束日期SHARPE_THRESHOLD = 1  # 夏普比率阈值FITNESS_THRESHOLD = 0.4  # 适应度阈值REGION = "USA"  # 区域ALPHA_NUM = 2000  # Alpha数量# 第二个算法的参数SELF_CORR_TAG = 'SelfCorr'  # 自相关性计算模式PPAC_CORR_TAG = 'PPAC'  # PPAC自相关性计算模式MAX_WORKERS_SELF_CORR = 5  # 自相关性计算的最大线程数# 动态生成输出文件名 名字加个时分秒的时间戳current_time = datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")OUTPUT_FILE = f"alpha_results/alpha_results_{START_DATE}_{REGION}_{current_time}.xlsx"OUTPUT_FILE2 = f"alpha_results/alpha_results_{START_DATE}_{REGION}_{current_time}.csv"   # 改为Excel格式output_columns =[    "alpha_id",    "check_status",    "sharpe",    "turnoverStr",    "turnover",    "turnoverCheck",    "fitness",    "marginStr",    "margin",    "marginCheck",    "returnsStr",    "returns",    "returnsCheck",    "drawdownStr",    "drawdown",    "drawdownCheck",    "longCount",    "shortCount",    "dateCreated",    "decay",    "exp",    "neutralization",    "neutralization_name",    "allCheck"]# ===== 登录函数 =====def sign_in(username, password):    s = requests.Session()    s.auth = (username, password)    try:        response = s.post('https://api.worldquantbrain.com/authentication')        response.raise_for_status()        logging.info("Successfully signed in")        return s    except requests.exceptions.RequestException as e:        logging.error(f"Login failed: {e}")        return Nonedef fetch_yearly_stats(session,alpha_id):    detail_url = f"https://api.worldquantbrain.com/alphas/{alpha_id}/recordsets/yearly-stats"    for retry in range(3):        try:            detail_resp = session.get(detail_url)            if detail_resp.status_code == 429:                time.sleep(3)                continue            if not detail_resp.text.strip() or detail_resp.text.strip().startswith('<') or 'application/json' not in detail_resp.headers.get('Content-Type', ''):                time.sleep(3)                continue            stats = detail_resp.json().get("records", [])            valid = [(y[3], y[4]) for y in stats if y[6] != 0]            # 筛选出至少有6年有数据，每年的long+short交易量大于100            if len(valid) >= 6 and all((lc + sc) > 100 for lc, sc in valid):                                return True            break        except Exception:            time.sleep(3)            continue    return False# ===== 第一个算法的函数 =====def get_submit_alphas(session, start_date, end_date, sharpe_th, fitness_th, region, alpha_num, tag=None):    """获取可以提交的Alpha信息"""    output = []  # 用于存储符合条件的Alpha记录    count = 0  # 用于统计处理的Alpha数量    YEAR_DATE_EMPTY_COUNT =0    # 分页获取数据，每次获取100条    for i in range(0, alpha_num, 100):        print(f"处理偏移量: {i}")        # 构造API请求URL        base_url = f"https://api.worldquantbrain.com/users/self/alphas?limit=100&offset={i}&status=UNSUBMITTED%1FIS_FAIL&dateCreated%3E=2025-{start_date}T00:00:00-04:00&dateCreated%3C=2025-{end_date}T00:00:00-04:00&is.fitness%3E={fitness_th}&is.sharpe%3E={sharpe_th}&settings.region={region}&order=-is.sharpe&hidden=false&type!=SUPER"        # 添加标签筛选条件        if tag:            base_url += f"&tags={tag}"        url = base_url        try:            response = session.get(url)  # 发送GET请求            if response.status_code == 200:  # 如果请求成功                alpha_list = response.json().get("results", [])  # 获取返回的Alpha列表                for alpha in alpha_list:                    # 提取Alpha的各项信息                    alpha_id = alpha.get("id")                    name = alpha.get("name")                    dateCreated = alpha.get("dateCreated")                    sharpe = alpha.get("is", {}).get("sharpe")                    fitness = alpha.get("is", {}).get("fitness")                    turnover = alpha.get("is", {}).get("turnover")                    returns = alpha.get("is", {}).get("returns")                    drawdown = alpha.get("is", {}).get("drawdown")                    margin = alpha.get("is", {}).get("margin")                    longCount = alpha.get("is", {}).get("longCount")                    shortCount = alpha.get("is", {}).get("shortCount")                    decay = alpha.get("settings", {}).get("decay")                    exp = alpha.get("regular", {}).get("code")                    # with open(name + '.pickle', 'wb') as f:        pickle.dump(obj, f, pickle.HIGHEST_PROTOCOL)def load_obj(name: str) -> object:    with open(name + '.pickle', 'rb') as f:        return pickle.load(f)def wait_get(session, url: str, max_retries: int = 10) -> "Response":    """    Robust GET with retry/backoff and a per-request timeout.    This avoids hanging forever when the remote server is slow or unresponsive    (which was causing the PPAC computation to stall at ~99%).    """    retries = 0    last_exception = None    while retries < max_retries:        try:            # 请求时带上超时时间，避免无限阻塞            simulation_progress = session.get(url, timeout=DEFAULT_REQUEST_TIMEOUT)            # 如果服务返回 Retry-After，遵守并等待再重试            retry_after = simulation_progress.headers.get("Retry-After")            if retry_after and float(retry_after) > 0:                time.sleep(float(retry_after))                # 不把这个计为一次失败重试，继续尝试                continue            # 成功返回（2xx/3xx/4xx判定只在 status_code < 400 认为成功）            if simulation_progress.status_code < 400:                return simulation_progress            # 非 2xx/3xx 响应，按指数回退重试            time.sleep(2 ** retries)            retries += 1        except requests.exceptions.RequestException as e:            # 捕获网络、超时等异常，记录并进行重试（指数回退）            last_exception = e            time.sleep(2 ** retries)            retries += 1    # 超过最大重试次数后，抛出最后一次异常或构造一个清晰的错误    if last_exception:        raise last_exception    raise requests.exceptions.RequestException(f"GET {url} failed after {max_retries} retries")def _get_alpha_pnl(session, alpha_id: str) -> pd.DataFrame:    # 使用带超时和重试的 wait_get，避免单个 PnL 请求长期阻塞线程    pnl = wait_get(session, "https://api.worldquantbrain.com/alphas/" + alpha_id + "/recordsets/pnl").json()    df = pd.DataFrame(pnl['records'], columns=[item['name'] for item in pnl['schema']['properties']])    df = df.rename(columns={'date': 'Date', 'pnl': alpha_id})    df = df[['Date', alpha_id]]    return dfdef get_alpha_pnls(        session,        alphas: list[dict],        alpha_pnls: Optional[pd.DataFrame] = None,        alpha_ids: Optional[dict[str, list]] = None) -> Tuple[dict[str, list], pd.DataFrame]:    if alpha_ids is None:        alpha_ids = defaultdict(list)    if alpha_pnls is None:        alpha_pnls = pd.DataFrame()    new_alphas = [item for item in alphas if item['id'] not in alpha_pnls.columns]    if not new_alphas:        return alpha_ids, alpha_pnls    for item_alpha in new_alphas:        alpha_ids[item_alpha['settings']['region']].append(item_alpha['id'])    fetch_pnl_func = lambda alpha_id: _get_alpha_pnl(session, alpha_id).set_index('Date')    with ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=10) as executor:        results = executor.map(fetch_pnl_func, [item['id'] for item in new_alphas])    alpha_pnls = pd.concat([alpha_pnls] + list(results), axis=1)    alpha_pnls.sort_index(inplace=True)    return alpha_ids, alpha_pnlsdef get_os_alphas(session, limit: int = 100, get_first: bool = False) -> List[Dict]:    fetched_alphas = []    offset = 0    retries = 0    total_alphas = 100    while len(fetched_alphas) < total_alphas:        print(f"Fetching alphas from offset {offset} to {offset + limit}")        url = f"https://api.worldquantbrain.com/users/self/alphas?stage=OS&limit={limit}&offset={offset}&order=-dateSubmitted"        res = wait_get(session, url).json()        if offset == 0:            total_alphas = res['count']        alphas = res["results"]        fetched_alphas.extend(alphas)        if len(alphas) < limit:            break        offset += limit        if get_first:            break    return fetched_alphas[:total_alphas]def calc_self_corr(        session,        alpha_id: str,        os_alpha_rets: pd.DataFrame | None = None,        os_alpha_ids: dict[str, str] | None = None,        alpha_result: dict | None = None,        return_alpha_pnls: bool = False,        alpha_pnls: pd.DataFrame | None = None) -> float | tuple[float, pd.DataFrame]:    if alpha_result is None:        alpha_result = wait_get(session, f"https://api.worldquantbrain.com/alphas/{alpha_id}").json()    if alpha_pnls is not None:        if len(alpha_pnls) == 0:            alpha_pnls = None    if alpha_pnls is None:        _, alpha_pnls = get_alpha_pnls(session, [alpha_result])        alpha_pnls = alpha_pnls[alpha_id]    alpha_rets = alpha_pnls - alpha_pnls.ffill().shift(1)    alpha_rets = alpha_rets[        pd.to_datetime(alpha_rets.index) > pd.to_datetime(alpha_rets.index).max() - pd.DateOffset(years=4)]    self_corr = logging.error(f"Failed to load existing data: {e}")            os_alpha_ids = None            os_alpha_pnls = None            exist_alpha = []            ppac_alpha_ids = []    else:        os_alpha_ids = None        os_alpha_pnls = None        exist_alpha = []        ppac_alpha_ids = []    if os_alpha_ids is None:        alphas = get_os_alphas(session, limit=100, get_first=False) 'ppac_alpha_ids'))    print(f'新下载的alpha数量: {len(alphas)}, 目前总共alpha数量: {os_alpha_pnls.shape[1]}')    return os_alpha_ids, os_alpha_pnlsdef load_data(data_path: Path, tag='PPAC'):    os_alpha_ids = item in os_alpha_ids:            os_alpha_ids[item] = [alpha for alpha in os_alpha_ids[item] if alpha in ppac_alpha_ids]    elif tag == 'SelfCorr':        for item in os_alpha_ids:            os_alpha_ids[item] = [alpha for alpha in os_alpha_ids[item] if alpha not in ppac_alpha_ids]    else:        os_alpha_ids = os_alpha_ids    exist_alpha = [alpha for ids in os_alpha_ids.values() for
